total_transition_budget_dkk.rationale: Source text states budgeted public financing range DKK 15-25 billion; central estimate used as base with stated endpoints as low/high.

actual_referendum_support.rationale: Base centered on committed support threshold 0.60 (DEFAULT, no anchored shift). Spread reflects historical Danish euro-referendum volatility; can overshoot target so triangular is appropriate.

actual_public_awareness.rationale: Base centered on plan's 0.70 awareness threshold (DEFAULT). Suggested estimation method bounds 0.4-0.9, consistent with analogous EU member referendum awareness surveys.

cash_logistics_shock_cost_dkk.rationale: Suggested estimation method anchors on stated DKK 100M overhead scenario with bound DKK 30M to 200M for dual-circulation cash logistics shock.

annual_real_indexation_factor.rationale: Base from plan's proposed factor 1.015; medium-uncertainty spread of approx +/- 1 percentage point reflects negotiation latitude around the proposal.

baseline_annual_inflation_rate.rationale: Suggested estimation method anchors on ECB/Danish CPI projections central 0.02 with 0.01-0.04 range for stress over multi-year transition.
